article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: Strong attribution compliance and several genuine author-voice bias instances identified, but a few labels are misapplied and notable biased passages were missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged excerpts are from the author’s first-person prose; no quoted slogans or external attributions were used.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items reflect genuine bias patterns in tone, framing, or unsupported assertions. A couple are debatable but still defensible as bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear, significant instances such as calling Khamenei ‘the Hitler of our century,’ claims about ‘left-leaning media’ motives, and ‘Obama chose them.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Some labels are off: ‘Mind Reading’ for broad regret claim should be Unsubstantiated/Opinion-as-fact; including ‘funds terrorism’ under Subjective Adjectives is imprecise; ‘Elite vs. Populist Bias’ is questionable; ‘Bias by Omission’ is debatable in an open-letter context.
